_comment: This file is a seed for the cross-language test. Only the `empty_envelope` vector is hand-verified (see tests/canonical_vectors.rs for the derivation). The full set of vectors is produced by the emit-vectors example and should be regenerated on first run of `make test` on a Linux host. The cross_language test is written to pass as long as the Rust canonicalizer agrees with the file; if the file is newer than this seed it reflects committed, reviewed reality.

vectors.name: empty_envelope
vectors.description: Fully default Envelope. Only the always-present bytes fields (payload, nonce) appear in canonical output. See tests/canonical_vectors.rs comment block for the hand derivation.
